title: Verify content is locked for cancelled trial users
description: Test that users who have cancelled their trial cannot access premium content sections
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 1. Login with a user who has cancelled their trial
3. Try to access content in Progress & Benefits section
4. Try to access content in Engagement section
5. Try to access content in Trending section

expected_result: All content sections display as locked for cancelled trial users
